title: VHS Overlay
description: VHS Effects shader with Overlay (Classic REC, date and time)
body:
◽ This shader adds the classic VHS tape Overlay with REC, date and time.
◽ Also effects like Film Grain, Scan Lines, Chroma Shift.
 

❗ Overlays are not static. It's working real time. (Not real date/time of your pc but like recording time.)

![ss](https://i.imgur.com/mmKAqaP.jpeg)

⚠️ Requires OptiFine or Iris (Sodium).
